Reentrancy in game.play_game(uint8) (game.sol#249-367):
	External calls:
	- require(bool)(ERC20Basic(tokenAddress_GIC).transfer(msg.sender,airdrop_GIC)) (game.sol#283)
	- (_player_amount,addressA_amount,addressB_amount) = Arina_amount() (game.sol#287-289)
		- GIC_balance = ERC20Basic(tokenAddress_GIC).balanceOf(_address) (game.sol#523)
		- Arina_totBalance = ERC20Basic(tokenAddress_Arina).balanceOf(this) (game.sol#435)
	- require(bool)(ERC20Basic(tokenAddress_Arina).transfer(msg.sender,_player_amount)) (game.sol#293)
	- require(bool)(ERC20Basic(tokenAddress_Arina).transfer(address_A,addressA_amount)) (game.sol#295)
	- require(bool)(ERC20Basic(tokenAddress_Arina).transfer(address_B,addressB_amount)) (game.sol#297)
	- bal = ERC20Basic(tokenAddress_GIC).balanceOf(this) + ERC20Basic(tokenAddress_Arina).balanceOf(this) (game.sol#321)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Play_game(msg.sender,player,comp,result) (game.sol#331)
	- Random(msg.sender,random_player,random_lottery) (game.sol#333)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [game.play_game(uint8)](game.sol#L249-L367):
	External calls:
	- [require(bool)(ERC20Basic(tokenAddress_GIC).transfer(msg.sender,airdrop_GIC))](game.sol#L283)
	- [(_player_amount,addressA_amount,addressB_amount) = Arina_amount()](game.sol#L287-L289)
		- [GIC_balance = ERC20Basic(tokenAddress_GIC).balanceOf(_address)](game.sol#L523)
		- [Arina_totBalance = ERC20Basic(tokenAddress_Arina).balanceOf(this)](game.sol#L435)
	- [require(bool)(ERC20Basic(tokenAddress_Arina).transfer(msg.sender,_player_amount))](game.sol#L293)
	- [require(bool)(ERC20Basic(tokenAddress_Arina).transfer(address_A,addressA_amount))](game.sol#L295)
	- [require(bool)(ERC20Basic(tokenAddress_Arina).transfer(address_B,addressB_amount))](game.sol#L297)
	- [bal = ERC20Basic(tokenAddress_GIC).balanceOf(this) + ERC20Basic(tokenAddress_Arina).balanceOf(this)](game.sol#L321)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [Play_game(msg.sender,player,comp,result)](game.sol#L331)
	- [Random(msg.sender,random_player,random_lottery)](game.sol#L333)
